videoSnippet.title: Hans vs Nepo || Belgrade Match 2026 || GAME 8 (+drama)
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Niemann, Hans Moke (2742) - Nepomniachtchi, Ian (2729)
Hans Niemann vs. Ian Nepomniachtchi 2026 (Chess.com) [08] 2026.06.01
B30 Sicilian, Nyezhmetdinov-Rossolimo attack (without ...d6)

1.e4 c5 2.Nf3 Nc6 3.Bb5 e6 4.Bxc6 bxc6 5.d3 Qc7 6.Nc3 e5 7.O-O d6 8.Ne2 Be7 9.h3 f5 10.exf5 Bxf5 11.Ng3 Qd7 12.a3 a5 13.Nd2 Nf6 14.Nc4 Nd5 15.f4 exf4 16.Bxf4 O-O 17.Nxf5 Rxf5 18.Bg3 Rxf1+ 19.Qxf1 a4 20.Re1 Rf8 21.Qe2 Rf6 22.Kh2 h6 23.Qe4 g5 24.Ne3 Nxe3 25.Rxe3 Bf8 26.Qxa4 h5 27.h4 Bh6 28.Qe4 g4 29.Re2 d5 30.Qe5 Qf7 31.a4 Rf1 32.a5 Bg7 33.Qe8+ Qxe8 34.Rxe8+ Kh7 35.Re1 Rf7 36.Bd6 Bxb2 37.a6 c4 38.Bc5 Bc3 39.Re8 cxd3 40.cxd3 

0:01 Hello Everyone!
01:10 Game Starts!
02:10 CNG (f5)
08:00 IWITP
08:50 SOME DRAMA
